title: codereview: update board defconfig and DTS for driver
description: t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_defconfig already enables INPUT but may need explicit select for the new driver. DTS node is present but may need irq-gpios or other properties for full TCA8418-like support. Test with Renode after implementation to ensure no bus errors on I2C reads to stub at 0x55.
